title: Personal & Corporate Banking | MSME & Agri banking - IDBI Bank
content:
“DO NOT PAY BRIBES. IF ANYBODY OF THIS OFFICE ASKS FOR BRIBE OR IF YOU HAVE ANY INFORMATION ON CORRUPTION IN THIS OFFICE OR IF YOU ARE A VICTIM OF CORRUPTION IN THIS OFFICE, YOU CAN COMPLAIN TO THE HEAD OF THIS DEPARTMENT, OR THE CHIEF VIGILANCE OFFICER/THE SUPERINTENDENT OF POLICE, CENTRAL BUREAU OF INVESTIGATION AND THE SECRETARY, CENTRAL VIGILANCE COMMISSION”. All complaints to the Central Vigilance Commission may be made in terms of its ‘Complaint Handling Policy’ which is available in public domain on the Commission’s website i.e. Complaints can also be lodged online on Commission’s website.
